textByHash.02c972aac2c0563ee2ee2019d6fd37112151f354: (Iwazaru Jumps up and down waving his arms and legs about wildly)
textByHash.152dd3e1887191930554b368948b9f946ce32ada: Ook Ah Ook! Ah! Ook! Ook Ah Ook!
textByHash.45b77cbed09f86eeb35aafa142399640b2b8bd50: (Iwazaru waves his arms about yet more)
textByHash.57917bef8f41d1106e909bcb0f0c70038729685f: Iwazaru nods and gives you the thumbs up.
textByHash.586319a259bd3c1b88eb152abff69e44a354aa53: (Iwazaru makes what you suspect was a very rude gesture to Mizaru)
textByHash.5b0b57bdd4abe3ea848444cc38bfe669ec45ccf4: (Iwazaru nods) He looks at Kikazaru to translate for him.
textByHash.5fe13177a74f423084b410e3d0383e69b77c5b1f: (Iwazaru waves his arms again. Whatever he said it wasn't very polite.)
textByHash.61244587006ef8bcaed82cf0a055a73dd316f8c3: mmmh!! (He quickly makes some signs at Kikazaru)
textByHash.6aeb8f0217f18758a71a27a1419ddebebd0af534: Iwazaru slaps both of the other monkeys on the back of the head!
textByHash.752fd572bcabc89259e1295f876c08a4cb485f3f: (He then wipes his forehead as if it were hot and points at the sacrificial pyre in the east of the temple.)
textByHash.8157c58bd5afd955f7348c4ce96740c52f99e2fe: Ook Ah Uh! Ook Ah Ook! Ah Ah!
textByHash.9af84a2dfa103ce0880e5fe4b198fa8aa8fcce7d: Iwazaru looks at the snake, sniffs it and nods sagely.
textByHash.9e74658b78b88d208f8ed34631e4284daeadc0be: (Iwazaru raises an eyebrow dubiously. You give him a wink.)
textByHash.b2d7f552555bbb4e24a9281f0b19700e04d77514: (Iwazaru is hysterically trying to get your attention)
textByHash.b84a9de86d0d74dade9e32f5759d43ef36bb7c00: Ook Ook! Ook Ah Ook! Ook! Ah! Ah!
textByHash.d7e8af66e5f3c7e252e4fdc7a466fca78d967817: He then points at you and falls over and plays dead, gets up and then shrugs.)
textByHash.e849bfbb1842edd199034e322c6c2c555496d5db: (Iwazaru sighs, and then points to the floor directly beneath him, then acts like a zombie.
textByHash.f205f552c8a1cc44ea53c7959e64afb73fc8581a: GGHHMM! (Iwazaru starts jumping up and down)
textByHash.f286d135f23b484753226e2c010839faa9e4c785: (Iwazaru mimes a crown on his head.)
